full_text:
Xiahou He (Yiquan) 夏侯和 (義權)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou He (夏侯和), styledYiquan (義權), was born in Pei. Fourth son of Xiahou Yuan. Fought well against Shu’s Zhuge Liang. Xiahou He was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
